memories.content: Descale the espresso boiler every 60 shots with citric acid.
Clean the conical burr grinder monthly; wipe retained grounds.
Purge the steam wand after every milk steaming to avoid crust.
Use an eastern forehand grip to generate topspin comfortably.
Toss at 1 o'clock and drive up through the ball for more pace.
Switch to a continental grip for volleys at the net.
Work hours are 09:00 to 17:30 on weekdays.
Our kitchen faucet is a Moen 7594; cartridge part number is 1255.
Sharpen the chef's knife on the 1000 grit stone monthly.
Tune the acoustic guitar to standard EADGBE before playing.
Practice scales in C major for 10 minutes before repertoire.

queries.text: how often do I descale the espresso machine
how do I sharpen my knife
